services: TradeDesk (WhatsApp expense manager for sole traders)
target_customers: Small businesses — tradespeople, local services, SMEs
how_customers_find_them: Cold calling (business is 10 days old), no inbound yet
local_competition: Few digital agencies in Dumfries & Galloway — most competitors are Edinburgh/Glasgow based or national template factories
photography_available: No professional photography. Portfolio consists of live project URLs — Not an Octavia, gAIns, Daily Duel, Tumble Tots. No screenshots or mockups currently.
strategic_notes: This is the agency's own site — the redesign IS the proof of capability. Every design decision must demonstrate what Nith Digital sells. The current site has zero images, text-only project cards, no scroll animations, inline React styles, and a flat visual hierarchy. It reads as a developer side project, not a professional agency. The site needs to convert cold call follow-ups into trust. Website design is the lead service; other services (Power BI, TradeDesk, social media, apps, SEO) are secondary but need proper pages. Portfolio must be visual — browser mockups, screenshots, interaction demos. Google Business profile should be created alongside the redesign.
